features.name: variable-width part select with multiplication offset
features.description: Code should include a variable-width part select using multiplication to compute the bit offset, where the offset expression involves multiplication of a variable with a constant

features.name: three-dimensional unpacked array with signed element
features.description: Code should include a three-dimensional unpacked array with signed reg elements, used in a convolution buffer

features.name: fifo module instantiation inside generate for loop
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop that instantiates multiple instances of a FIFO module with index-based port connections
features.snippet: generate for(m=0;m<3;m=m+1) begin fifo row_inst(.clk(clk), .write_data(row_in[m]), .write(row_wr[m]), .read(row_rd[m]), .read_data(row_out[m]), .full(row_full[m]), .empty(row_empty[m])); end endgenerate

features.name: ram with unpacked array declaration
features.description: Code should include a RAM implemented as an unpacked array of registers with parameterized address and data widths

features.name: two-dimensional unpacked array of signed elements
features.description: Code should include a two-dimensional unpacked array of signed reg elements used for accumulation results
